allow: Bash(echo "=== electron dir ==="; ls node_modules/electron/; echo "=== dist? ==="; ls node_modules/electron/dist/ 2>&1 | head; echo "=== .npmrc \(project\) ==="; cat .npmrc 2>&1; echo "=== .npmrc \(home\) ==="; cat ~/.npmrc 2>&1)

PowerShell(Set-Location "e:\\programmings\\FocusDAW-Studio"; $env:FOCUSDAW_SMOKE_EXIT = "1"; $p = Start-Process -FilePath "node_modules\\.bin\\electron.cmd" -ArgumentList "." -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\fdaw_e_out.txt" -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\fdaw_e_err.txt" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; $alive = -not $p.HasExited; if \(-not $p.HasExited\) { Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force -Confirm:$false -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Get-Process FocusDAW-AudioEngine -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -Confirm:$false -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "alive_after_8s=$alive"; "--- STDOUT ---"; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\fdaw_e_out.txt" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 30; "--- STDERR ---"; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\fdaw_e_err.txt" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 30)

PowerShell(Set-Location "e:\\programmings\\FocusDAW-Studio"; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location $using:PWD; & cmd /c "node_modules\\.bin\\electron.cmd . 1> `"$env:TEMP\\fdaw2_out.txt`" 2> `"$env:TEMP\\fdaw2_err.txt`"" }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; $procs = Get-Process electron -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $engine = Get-Process FocusDAW-AudioEngine -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "electron_procs=$\($procs.Count\)"; "engine_running=$\([bool]$engine\)"; Stop-Job $job -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Job $job -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($procs\) { $procs | Stop-Process -Force -Confirm:$false -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; if \($engine\) { $engine | Stop-Process -Force -Confirm:$false -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; "--- STDERR ---"; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\fdaw2_err.txt" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 20)

PowerShell(Set-Location "e:\\programmings\\FocusDAW-Studio\\dist\\win-unpacked"; $exe = ".\\FocusDAW Studio.exe"; $p = Start-Process -FilePath $exe -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 12; $main = Get-Process "FocusDAW Studio" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $engine = Get-Process FocusDAW-AudioEngine -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "main_procs=$\($main.Count\)"; "engine_running=$\([bool]$engine\)"; $wins = Get-Process "FocusDAW Studio" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowTitle -ne "" } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty MainWindowTitle; "window_titles=$\($wins -join ' | '\)"; Get-Process "FocusDAW Studio" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -Confirm:$false -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Process FocusDAW-AudioEngine -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -Confirm:$false -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "cleaned")

PowerShell(Set-Location "e:\\programmings\\FocusDAW-Studio\\dist\\win-unpacked"; & cmd /c 'set ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=& start "" "FocusDAW Studio.exe"'; Start-Sleep -Seconds 12; $main = Get-Process "FocusDAW Studio" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $engine = Get-Process FocusDAW-AudioEngine -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "main_procs=$\($main.Count\)"; "engine_running=$\([bool]$engine\)"; $wins = $main | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowTitle -ne "" } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty MainWindowTitle; "window_titles=$\($wins -join ' | '\)")

PowerShell(Get-Process "FocusDAW Studio" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -Confirm:$false -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Process FocusDAW-AudioEngine -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -Confirm:$false -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $r = Get-Process "FocusDAW Studio",FocusDAW-AudioEngine -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "remaining=$\($r.Count\)")

PowerShell($p = Start-Process -FilePath "E:\\programmings\\FocusDAW-Studio\\bin\\FocusDAW-AudioEngine.exe" -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\eng-out.txt" -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\eng-err.txt" -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; Write-Output "exited: $\($p.HasExited\)"; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\eng-out.txt" -TotalCount 20; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\eng-err.txt" -TotalCount 20; Test-NetConnection -ComputerName localhost -Port 8082 -InformationLevel Quiet; if \(-not $p.HasExited\) { Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force })

PowerShell(Get-Process FocusDAW-AudioEngine -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, StartTime; try { $c = New-Object Net.Sockets.TcpClient; $c.Connect\("127.0.0.1", 8082\); Write-Output "tcp connect: OK"; $c.Close\(\) } catch { Write-Output "tcp connect: FAIL $_" })

PowerShell($p = Start-Process -FilePath "E:\\programmings\\FocusDAW-Studio\\bin\\FocusDAW-AudioEngine.exe" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; node -e "const ws = new WebSocket\('ws://127.0.0.1:8082'\); ws.onopen = \(\) => { console.log\('WS OPEN'\); process.exit\(0\); }; ws.onerror = \(e\) => { console.log\('WS ERR:', e.message || e.type\); process.exit\(1\); }; setTimeout\(\(\) => { console.log\('timeout'\); process.exit\(2\); }, 5000\);"; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
PowerShell(node --check audio-engine.js && node --check audio-bridge.js && \(Get-Content package.json | ConvertFrom-Json\).version)
